name: CSR2 PvP Car Drag Racing Games

detail.description:
CSR Racing 2 – This driving simulator game redefines what you thought possible on your mobile device!

Setting a new standard in racing game visuals, CSR2 delivers hyper-real drag racing to the palm of your hand. Compete against live players across the world with your custom built supercars.
Team up with friends to form a crew, and dominate the competition in global crew events. CSR2 is all-new; download for free and start racing now!

LEGENDS LIVE FOREVER!
Prove yourself worthy of owning the in
detail.releaseNotes: A new version has pulled up to the line! Update to keep your race action fast and your car collection growing with new events and a smoother gameplay experience!
